Careers

Work that's actually
worth doing.

We're a small team of experienced practitioners. We don't hire to fill headcount — we bring people in when we find someone who's genuinely exceptional and a fit for how we work. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you.

Small team, real clients

You won't be in a queue waiting for interesting work. At Forecight, you work directly with decision-makers at organizations that take security seriously. Your advice lands — and you see the outcome.

No billable hour pressure

We're outcome-driven. We care about whether clients' programs are getting better, not whether we've hit a utilization target. Work gets done thoroughly, not quickly-enough-to-invoice.

Cross-discipline depth

Our work spans advisory, technical, managed, and compliance — so you build breadth alongside depth. If you've been siloed in a large org, this is the opposite of that.

Remote-first, Canadian

We operate across Canada. Our team works remotely with the flexibility that comes from trusting experienced people to manage their own time — and occasional in-person client work when it matters.

Open roles

Who we're looking for.

We don't always have open roles posted — but we're always interested in meeting exceptional practitioners. The kinds of backgrounds we draw from:

  • Senior Security Advisors with vCISO or program leadership experience
  • Compliance specialists across PIPEDA, SOC 2, ISO 27001, or NIST frameworks
  • Incident response practitioners with hands-on investigation experience
  • Cloud security architects (AWS or Azure focus)
  • Technical security analysts with detection engineering or pentest backgrounds
  • Security engineers with SIEM, EDR, or identity platform depth

We're based in Canada and typically look for Canadian-based practitioners or those authorized to work in Canada. Client engagements are primarily with Canadian organizations.

Express interest

No open role that fits? Send us a note anyway. We review every submission.

Questions

Not sure if you're a fit?
Reach out anyway.

Canada's pure-play cybersecurity advisory firm.
